{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303371129816526F0840718C1FA"}"},"total":731},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615244461480461118","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无敌文中的精品，有些无敌文主角无敌后的套路千篇一律，这本书作者把主角无敌和建设封建社会，实现人人平等两个爽点相结合，而且有仇下一章就报，能让人不跳章看下去，五星好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773064600,"group_id":"7597100816935177240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0Cavqx8zEAfi8Ldka5UBMjUkL7z6/ywSg0zVtmIe9q","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"1434206334361392","user_name":"热不死的冰棒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1434206334361392","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597100816935177240","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《惹我？给你家蚯蚓都竖着劈》
穿越成瞎子，开局送个哑巴？
王一言表示问题不大，因为自带《易筋经》和因果武道系统。
他人命运，皆是我武道资粮！
乱世妖魔横行？我易筋经黑级浮屠，一掌镇之！
世家高傲，皇权腐朽？我以因果为刃，掀翻这棋盘！
幽荒邪神，外域强敌？待我无间境界达成，皆如蝼蚁！
“我最初，只是想和阿钰好好活下去。”
“后来，不小心就成了这乱世的天。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3d60485d498ca78aafdff6e44db2ed04","author":"小王同志要努力","author_id":"","book_id":"7597100816935177240","book_name":"仙武：从龙虎易筋经开始无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"32.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597100884962574872","read_count":"322986","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"557221"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"243","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1dc580c162c30c7a2825542e19581c62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392231&x-signature=kW54JaFWOQ6kRNKypT9IricXiCU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2779172549695112","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"209"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303371129816526F0840718C1FA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
